text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Both the track and weather conditions are in line
with the simulations I ran.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(All that's left is to make final adjustments on the
values once I get to the venue and have Parcae
put together a strategy for me...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
> Start initialization process?
>[y]:

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Even after resetting Parcae with a fresh install,
they've continued to output accurate estimates.
Nothing's changed, but...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: They don't feel the same—like we lost some sorta supernatural connection or something, I don't know.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(...I sound like an idiot. Parcae's just a program.
Really...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Still, I'm half convinced Parcae showed me the
old fate again just to rile me up...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's enough. I need a quick restart to clear my
cache too.

text_block_list.name: Newspaper
text_block_list.text:
Battle for the Spring Tenno Sho!
Which of these titans is coming out on top? Will
the Overlord seize yet more glory, or will one of
her rivals steal the show?

text_block_list.name: Web Article
text_block_list.text:
Spring Tenno Sho Exclusive Interview!
Top Runners Claim Their Rivals!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, people sure seem excited about the spring
Tenno Sho! I didn't realize it was happening
today.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. I saw some predictions on tv the other
day. They were ragging on one of the racers big
time, though. What was her name again? Air
Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: She's gotta be a massive jerk for them to talk about her like that. I get that she's up against some absolute gems, but still... yikes.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: H-hey, shut up! It's her!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?! You got somethin' to say to me?!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A & B
text_block_list.text:
Eep!
No, it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If it was really "nothing," they wouldn't have to
run off in shame, would they?
choice_data_list:
People like that aren't getting to you anymore,
huh?

People like that aren't getting to you anymore,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Well yeah. They never did get to me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And the hell's with your reaction? Your trainee
just scared random people off.
choice_data_list:
Well... It'd be nice to hear some praise, huh?
Imagine the stands all cheering for you.

Well... It'd be nice to hear some praise, huh?
Imagine the stands all cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah. Keep dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I honestly... I don't get why they cheer for who they do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Races call the predicted winner the "favorite,"
right? Even if it's someone everyone hates like
me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I mean sure, there's times where the "favorite" is
someone popular, but... It just seems like a dumb
word choice.
choice_data_list: ...Do you want to be people's real favorite?
...Do you want to be people's real favorite?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Gross... Don't go askin' me such stupid
questions, idiot!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinkin' about the mental gymnastics of
it all.
choice_data_list: Well, people find different things exciting.
Well, people find different things exciting.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you mean like rivals dukin' it out in a contest
of dreams and determination?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just somethin' some troll said a while back.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Apparently I can never be the "real deal" without
a rival.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They said I was lucky to skate by unchallenged...
It was really annoying.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, they'll be eating those words soon
enough—when I shove them down their throat.
...Right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah. You're gettin' good at rilin' me up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna get your hopes up with no proof,
but... I'm not gonna jinx myself anymore either.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're here, they're here!
Kyaaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the beautiful final notes of spring, the
loveliest prelude to verdant summer! That is to
say, I have arrived! Feast your eyes upon my
glorious visage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What's that? You wish for me to blow you a kiss?
Ask and you shall receive! There's more than
enough to spare! Mwah, mwah! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead, Doto! 'Tis your turn to set the
spectators' hearts alight!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep! W-well, um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: M-mwah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-omigosh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Don't count me out!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
All your cheers and well wishes are my strength. I
promise to pay you back with a wonderful race
between myself and my equally wonderful rivals!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm excited to have a no-holds-barred battle with
you too, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Cool story. Not interested.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Man... The way Air Shakur acts... It's not even
"cool" or edgy anymore, it's just rude.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, its hard to get excited about her. If she's gonna behave like a total monster, I'd rather she ran like a monster too. I thought that's the kinda person she was, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I dare you all to look at me now and say I just
got lucky.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Generations, rivals... Don't push that crap on me.
I want nothing to do with it.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not runnin' because I want people's attention.
I run to improve myself.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You want tenacity? I got it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I don't need anyone expecting anythin' from me.
They'll learn soon enough what it really means to
be the real deal.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: My rise starts today!
